comparison.delta: +80 pp on identical instances, identical model — confirms scaffold mismatch

notes: Same 5 astropy instances as the claw smoke. opencode lets qwen36 produce real source edits including the canonical gold patches for separability_matrix (cright[...] = right) and FITS D-exponent (output_field[:] = chararray.replace(...)). The 1 unresolved (14365) used the same incomplete re.IGNORECASE fix in BOTH scaffolds — that's a model limitation on that specific bug, not scaffold-dependent. Conclusion: qwen36's underperformance in claw was the scaffold workflow (thinking-mode silence + claw's iteration model), not the model or the tool-call parser fix alone.
